item.title: People will cry about anything
item.description: Why woke? Because they've included a slider to adjust the difficulty/speed of the game. "It's ruining the spirit of the game!" They cry. Doom has always had difficulty settings. What's more, you can crank the slider all the way up and it's harder/faster than baseline. I fucking hate people. I seriously want to hit people who use woke as an offensive term. I could at least see if they had rammed a bunch of LGBT content in (I wouldn't agree, but I could see where it would be deemed woke...especially if it contributed nothing) but for fuck's sake....a difficulty slider isn't woke
item.dc:creator: Syndicofberyl

item.title: horrors beyond comprehension
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Thursday WHOLESOME DUMP :) Watch this is if you need your soul to smile #593
item.description:
1. "Son, I'm so proud right now!"
2. Arnold being asked to read famous movie lines in his own unique way!
3. Ahhh yes, a catfish in it's natural habitat
4. Doing a cute dance in between filming a scene
5. What emotional roller coaster of a video
6
7. Just a video of a trebuchet
8. Yo, can you fix my nails real quick too
9
10. Nature
11. The substitute professor came in to class today
12
13. Dog shows cat love
14. And finally something wholesome from myself! I've been working on this wacky narrative game called Do Not Press The Button and today I'm happy to announce that game will release next month - on 16th of April 2025! Please enjoy the new trailer I made to mark the occasion! And if you want to support small indie dev teams like me and my brother, please wishlist the game on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Part 1
15. Part 2 of the trailer: Currently my favorite meme is the ABSOLUTE CINEMA. Please honestly tell me if I've earned it, with this trailer? I mean it's B.A.F.T.A.* nominated!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.description: Bet they’re not worried about egg prices
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: What Happened Today #48
item.description: ? 20 stories. One day. Democracy under siege. Trump escalates attacks on courts, immigrants, and public institutions. The ICC is crumbling, DHS is detaining academics, and Musk-backed lawmakers push to remove judges. Meanwhile, protests grow as Tesla stock tanks. We’ve never had to cover this much in one day—because it’s never been this relentless. ⚡ Stay informed. Stay engaged. ? Subscribe free → https://govbrief.today ? Share this. Keep the spotlight on. #GovBriefToday #Resist2025 1. https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/mar/20/ukraine-war-briefing-trump-wants-zaporizhzhia-power-plant-for-us 2. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/education/2025/03/19/trump-eliminate-education-department-order/82235735007/ 3. https://www.nhonews.com/news/pentagon-blames-mistake-for-deletion-of-navajo-code-talkers-pages-in-dei-scrub-says-content/article_9253c3ef-ca95-4769-b853-0e5e43a68755.html 4. https://abcnews.go.com/Business/fed-set-make-interest-rate-decision-outbreak-trade/story?id=119905993 5. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/judge-orders-trump-administration-to-return-two-transgender-inmates-to-women-s-prisons/ar-AA1Bg9AA?ocid=TobArticle 6. https://abcnews.go.com/US/wireStory/justice-department-moves-drop-lawsuit-texas-police-arrest-119962096 7. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5203401-elonauskidagency/ 8. https://www.courthousenews.com/texas-senate-passes-bill-requiring-ten-commandments-in-schools/ 9. https://apnews.com/article/social-security-offices-closures-doge-trump-b2b1a5b2ba4fb968abc3379bf90715ff 10. https://www.propublica.org/article/geo-group-ice-detainees-wage 11. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/judge-denies-bid-stop-doge-takeover-u-s-institute-of-peace/ 12. https://www.mediaite.com/news/former-trump-attorneys-social-security-number-revealed-in-jfk-files-dump-its-absolutely-outrageous/ 13. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/19/trump-new-mexico-militarized-border 14. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/19/trump-deportation-georgetown-graduate-student-00239754 15. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8712p5y48do 16. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/trump-administration-pushes-back-judges-request-answers-deporation-fli-rcna197050-boasberg-justice-department-tren-de-aragua-el-salvador 17. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/19/world/middleeast/trump-houthis-yemen-strikes.html 18. https://www.msn.com/en-ca/news/world/musk-donates-thousands-to-gop-members-of-congress-pushing-to-impeach-judge-who-oppose-trump-report/ar-AA1BgOQB 19. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-03-19/war-crimes-court-says-trump-sanctions-put-its-existence-at-risk?srnd=undefined 20. https://newrepublic.com/post/192946/french-scientist-denied-us-entry-trump-criticism 21. https://www.theverge.com/news/633091/tesla-takedown-protesters-planning-biggest-day-of-action

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i see brains
there goes my friday night
i guess
looks kinda shady
i'm hoping the picture is unrelated
it was me.. weird fetish
so it was bunk viagra
what could go wrong?
not bad
severely hard
wait what
that kid is cooler than i'll ever be
(Judge is 6'7")
patrick bateman
good to know?
amen brother
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: First in, last out
item.description: When the Nazis were burning books, they started with LGBTQ stuff. When they started rounding people up for the camps they started with the LGBTQ population. History might not repeat, but it rhymes.
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherGirlYouKnow

item.title: Armored Ciri Cosplay by LittleLuckyCosplay | Photography by World of Gwendana
item.description:
Armored Ciri Cosplay based on Witcher 3 concept art by Klaus Wittmann. Everything handmade by me out of EVA foam/fake leather/3D printing. Printed Aerondight because I’ve made Zireael in the past and wanted to mix it up (the spikes on the hand guard also matched the studs on her gloves in the concept art). I owe my life to the incredibly talented photographer @WorldofGwendana for these shots. I like to think I have a good amount of experience in making cosplay; however, I have close to 0 experience in posing for photographs, as I’ve been rocking iPhone photography for the majority of the time that I’ve cosplayed. I learned so much during this shoot and received so much guidance and direction - I could not have achieved pictures anywhere near this level of badassery without World of Gwendana’s expertise. His portfolio is incredible and I am so honored to now be among the subjects. It was an absolute pleasure and I cannot stop staring at these photos, so happy to pay homage to a character that I love so much!!
This might be one of my favorite shots!!!
Love that you can see the Witcher hook in the back (though it flipped around in this pic lol)
Angery
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay

item.title: Eggs for everyone!!
item.description: It's not very much money but it's my money. This employer was super shitty to me and they shorted me on something but the person at the labour board said that the evidence that I provided was enough to proceed with a request. Hopefully they comply and that's that.

item.title: Representation is important
item.description: "I remember running out of the creche and saying, 'Look broodmother! There are Goblins on TV and they aren't ambushing a party of adventurers!'. It was a big deal to me." - Seth Green

I just like Filburt
The void hungers
"Cronch" Says the pelvis
Lego SPAS-12!
No audio for this one sadly
suddenly....
Nobody watching?
Ack!
Prett sure that was an airsoft pistol (alas no audio)
Yeah this happens to me a lot.
Is fren shaped.
Moar frens
Talking kitties.
Brown pants moments.

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description: Just geared up for a walk and it started raining. Showed Panko but he said so what? Feeling pretty good now from the surgery. Very minor soreness here and there. I think I’ll take my bandages off tomorrow to see how everything is healing. Still got another week off work so I’m powering my way through one piece. Just finished Punk Hazard.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy
